title: BEM-867 compare working paths
objective:
Run script:
"""
paths = {
    'bem866_result': Path('governance/workflow_dispatch_results/bem865_claude_write_selftest_result.json'),
    'bem866_processed': Path('governance/workflow_dispatch_processed/bem865_claude_write_selftest.json'),
    'bem866_mailbox': Path('governance/audit/mailbox/from_claude/BEM865_CLAUDE_WRITE_SELFTEST_RESPONSE.md'),
    'bem867_queue': Path('governance/workflow_dispatch_queue/bem867_battle_audit_mailbox.json'),
    'bem867_processed': Path('governance/workflow_dispatch_processed/bem867_battle_audit_mailbox.json'),
    'bem867_result': Path('governance/workflow_dispatch_results/bem867_battle_audit_mailbox_result.json'),
    'bem867_mailbox': Path('governance/audit/mailbox/from_claude/BEM867_BATTLE_AUDIT_RESPONSE.md'),
    'processor': Path('scripts/process_workflow_dispatch_queue.py'),
    'runner': Path('.github/workflows/codex-runner.yml')
}
summary = []
for name, p in paths.items():
    text = p.read_text(encoding='utf-8', errors='ignore') if p.exists() else ''
    summary.append('- ' + name + ': exists=' + str(p.exists()) + ', size=' + str(len(text)))
    if name in ['bem866_result', 'bem866_mailbox', 'bem867_queue', 'bem867_result', 'bem867_mailbox']:
        safe = ''.join(ch if ch.isalnum() else '_' for ch in name)[:80]
        detail = Path('governance/runtime/curator_dispatch/bem867_compare_' + safe + '.md')
        detail.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
        detail.write_text('# BEM-867 compare detail\nName: ' + name + '\nPath: ' + str(p) + '\nExists: ' + str(p.exists()) + '\n\nText:\n' + text[:3000] + '\n', encoding='utf-8')
        changed_files.append(str(detail))
status = 'COMPARE_DONE'
marker = Path('governance/runtime/curator_dispatch/BEM867_COMPARE_WORKING_PATHS_' + status + '.md')
marker.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
marker.write_text('# BEM-867 compare working paths\nStatus: ' + status + '\n' + '\n'.join(summary) + '\n', encoding='utf-8')
changed_files.append(str(marker))
ops_applied.append('BEM867 compared BEM866 working path and BEM867 pending path')
"""
No issue comments.
